description: This file defines a Next.js page component for displaying detailed information about an insurance claim, including fraud score, signals, network relations, and actions like rescoring or assignment.

methods.name: ClaimDetailPage
methods.description: Main React component for the claim detail page; manages state, data loading, rescoring, and rendering claim info, signals, network, and controls.

methods.name: loadData
methods.description: Asynchronous function that fetches claim data, signals, and network information concurrently and updates component state.

methods.name: handleRescore
methods.description: Function triggering re-scoring of the claim, then reloading data to reflect updated scores.

methods.name: DetailRow
methods.description: Helper React component for rendering a labeled detail row with an icon.
